label: Nova/Supernova Music Festival
sub: 364 killed, ~40 taken hostage — Oct 7 massacre site

label: Kibbutz Be'eri
sub: ~97 killed, ~30 taken hostage — 10% of community lost

label: Kibbutz Kfar Aza
sub: 66 killed, 19 taken hostage — 'young farm' section devastated

label: Kibbutz Nir Oz
sub: ~40 killed, ~79 taken hostage — 25% of community; Bibas family taken here

label: Kibbutz Nahal Oz
sub: Kibbutz and adjacent military observation base overrun; 66 soldiers killed

label: Nahal Oz IDF Base
sub: Unit 414 intelligence observation post overrun; 15 female soldiers taken hostage

label: Re'im Military Base (Gaza Division HQ)
sub: Gaza Division HQ attacked; fighting lasted hours inside compound

label: Kibbutz Holit
sub: 12 killed — entire families murdered in southernmost kibbutz attack

label: Kibbutz Sufa
sub: Attacked by Hamas infiltrators; soldiers at adjacent army base killed

label: Kibbutz Alumim
sub: Attacked — residents sheltered, armed civilian response helped hold off fighters

label: Kibbutz Nirim
sub: Attacked; several residents taken hostage including Thai workers

label: Sderot Police Station
sub: Police chief killed; station seized by Hamas for hours

label: Ofakim — Battle Site
sub: ~100 Hamas fighters reached city; armed civilians and off-duty soldiers repelled attack; 52 killed

label: Kibbutz Ein HaShlosha
sub: Attacked by Hamas infiltrators

label: Kibbutz Mefalsim
sub: Attacked; residents held in safe rooms for hours

label: Kibbutz Kissufim / Fence Crossing
sub: Major fence breach point; fighter staging area before dispersing to communities

label: Northern Fence Breach (near Erez)
sub: Fighters infiltrated northward toward Sderot and coastal communities

label: Central Fence Breach (Be'eri area)
sub: One of ~29 fence breach points; main infiltration corridor for Be'eri fighters

label: Southern Fence Breach (Nir Oz area)
sub: Multiple breach points in southern section; fighters moved to Nir Oz and Nova festival

label: Extreme South Fence Breach
sub: Southernmost breach — fighters headed to Holit, Sufa, Nirim

label: Northern Gaza Rocket Launch Zone
sub: Main Hamas rocket launch area targeting Sderot, Ashkelon, Tel Aviv

label: Central Gaza Rocket Launch Zone
sub: Rocket batteries targeting Be'er Sheva and central Israel

label: Khan Yunis Rocket Launch Zone
sub: Southern Gaza rocket batteries; long-range rockets toward Jerusalem and Tel Aviv

label: Kibbutz Or HaNer
sub: Attacked; several residents taken hostage

label: Netivot — Rocket Impacts
sub: City hit by rocket fire; Iron Dome partially failed to intercept all rockets

label: Ashkelon — Heavy Rocket Fire
sub: City of 140,000 hit by multiple rocket barrages; direct hits on residential buildings

label: Zikim Military Base (IDF Training Base)
sub: Hamas raided Zikim coastal base; IDF repelled attack after initial breach

label: Paraglider Landing Zone — Nova Festival
sub: Hamas fighters used motorized paragliders to bypass fence and land near festival

label: IDF Southern Command HQ (Be'er Sheva)
sub: Southern Command scrambled response from Kirya (Be'er Sheva); initial coordination breakdown

label: Kibbutz Nir Am
sub: Armed security team successfully held off Hamas infiltrators; one of few communities to repel attack
